feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Delete
entry.content: Delete

entry.title: Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PX0400
entry.content:
Hi,

WD to SAP Int. Error. Emp is existing in WD but not interfaces to SAP, so trying to manual hire in pA40 but getting below error Please assist on below error 

 

Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx 

Message No. PBAS_SERVICE001

Diagnosis

If two users change a person's data at the same time, the system cannot decide which changes have priority. For this reason, only one user is ever permitted to make changes at any one time.

User Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx is currently editing the person.

System Response

The system does not allow you to edit the person.

Procedure

Wait until user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx  has finished editing the person.

Procedure for System Administration

User S_XI_PXxxxx  keeps a lock for lock object EPPRELE 80124140.

entry.title: Anniversary Tile for Managers
entry.content: Has anyone set up an Anniversary Alert Tile on the Home Page alerting managers of their employees' anniversary dates and years of service? If so, do you have any lessons learned, KBAs, or resources you could share based on your experience in setting it up? Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Can realize bidirectional data transfer between HCM and EC？
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about SAP Integration Suite. Currently, we have established a unidirectional data flow from HCM to SF_EC via SAP Integration Suite. I am keen to understand whether SAP Integration Suite can be augmented to support bidirectional data exchange, thereby enabling modifications made in SF_EC to be seamlessly reflected back in our HCM system.

In contemplating this two-way transmission, I am also mindful of potential data integrity concerns, specifically the risk of data collisions or inconsistencies that might arise during concurrent updates. Could you shed light on SAP Integration Suite's mechanisms for handling such scenarios, ensuring that data coherence and accuracy are preserved throughout the process?

That's my confusion.


Thanks and regards,

PanPan

entry.title: ESS & MSS ON S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can anyone let me know how to configure ESS & MSS in S4 HANA.

entry.title: Data Fields Definitions
entry.content:
Hello:

I can not get access to the data fields definitions within the solution scenarios for HCM.  Is there a reason why?  The link is dead.  Do you need permissions?  For example below

Data Fields Definition:  Employment Details Imports | SAP Help Portal

Page Not Found | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Do you use SuccessFactors employee Directory as WhosWho ?
entry.content:
Do you use SuccessFactors Employee Directory 

as a Personnel List,

List of Staff,

Who’s Who 

in your organization ?

if not, what was the gap you have identified to match these needs ?

Some actions can be customized to call Directory, and these make it a more friendly tool,

 but other configuration sides seems complex to maintain over time, so we are curious to know about these parts from customers who went into these journey.

entry.title: zinfotype for pp01 in OM HCM
entry.content:
hello dear consultants

i want to add a zinfotype in pp01

I have configured the aspects and country-specific sections for this infotype, and I have also configured table T777I. However, I cannot see the infotype in my list in PP01. I should mention that I can see this infotype in PP02.

Does anyone have a solution for this issue?

entry.title: Report Center - Last Report Run Date
entry.content:
Hi there,

We are currently working on implementing People Analytics and I will need to migrate some of our reports from report center.  Is there a way to see when a report was last run.  We have over 700 reports created, but only want to migrate those that have been run in the past year.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to download a data change report for Comp and Job info after particular date
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on building a report for another 3P tool for variable payout for incentive schemes which is based on employee's org details and salary details.

When we build an adhoc report, and want to create a report for the employee data only when there are any changes made to the employee profile in Job or comp info portlet. 

For example, comp changed on 1 Jun 2023 effective 1 Apr 2023 from 100 to 110, and if we pull a report on 2 Jun, only this employee record should come.

another example, if we put the last modified date as 1 Jun 2023, any records updated after 1 Jun 2023 should only be reported for comp or job info. 

Any suggestions to solve this will be appreciated. 

thanks. V

entry.title: My team member accidentally Generated Object for IT0001 on the PM01->IT Tab
entry.content:
We wanted to generate a new customer include on the single screen tab, but one of our member accidentally generated new object for the infotype 0001  on the IT tab of PM01

It caused some inconsistencies and errors on PA30 when trying to save IT0000 record as below

After we checked, the program MP000100 for IT0000 has changed.

v1 picture is the module pool before IT0001 object got overwritten on PM01

v2 picture is the module pool after IT0001 got overwritten on PM01

Is there anyway to revert back the accidental generation of IT0001?

Any help would be appreciated. Thank you

entry.title: Infotype 2001 keep opening screen number 2000 but only for certain users.
entry.content:
I had already configured table T554S for an absence type that would deduct a quota as below 

I can open it normally and it would show screen number 2001,

But when another user wanted to create a new IT2001 record the screen number that appear for them is 2000

What could be the cause of the screen differences between our user?

entry.title: Assign Fiori processes to the user HCMFAB_STARTPROCESS/011
entry.content:
Hi,

When I try to Start Process in fiori HCP app, I get HCMFAB_STARTPROCESS/011 error.

I activated the HCMFAB_START_PROCESS_SRV service.

I wonder what could have gone wrong?

entry.title: What is the reason for Daily WS to automatically change from 1234 to 4231?
entry.content:
We have built a WSR for specific employees with Daily WS '1234' shift time 1330-2300 however, upon checking it suddenly changed to '4321' shift time 1300-2300. We are definitely sure the requirements is '1234' and has been inputted accordingly. It only happened on a number of week, like Week 7, Week 9  and Week 10 of 30 Weeks roster.

Is there a way to found out why it suddenly changed?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP ERP – PP61 T-Code – Managerial control for related Personal Subarea
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to give T-Code PP61 for use of Managers in order to add Substitutions for their employees for shift planning.

But we want them to open their workers shift planning table by adding personnel subarea code .

Picture-1 from screenshot

So we created and specified new Profile for shift planning and changed Entry Object type from Organization to Personnel Subarea. After that Although Personnel area and Personnel Subarea lists are displayed and  we choose them nothing happens. We cant display anything.

Picture-2 from screenshot

As we understand it is because of the wrong Evaluation path

Picture-3 from screenshot

We tried to create a custom evaluation path from T778A table but couldn't find appropriate object type relationships (for exp. I1 > S > P , or O > S > P >I1) . Can we create such evaluation path ? But we don’t know exactly whether that would help us or not . Looking forward for your assistance. We couldn’t find any information about object types and relationships anywhere

Picture-4 from screenshot

entry.title: HRESS cancel and change Buttons are not display after a approved request
entry.content:
i have a problem
when a user makes a vacancy request or a home office request on ess he has the possibility to change or delete because the buttons are still visible but when his request is accepted by the approver and his data are already in IT2001 and IT 2002 he can neither change nor delete because the buttons have disappeared. how and where can i make his buttons visible even if the user has already received an affirmation or a refusal of his request.
I've looked at the buttons in the FPM and they're created automatically, but I don't know where exactly.
the problem is that some users want to change their vacation but can't because the change button is invisible. how can i do this? thank you for your answers.

entry.title: Form 16 for Ex-SAP Labs India Employee
entry.content:
Hi, I am an Ex-Employee at SAP Labs India. I wanted to ask how I can get the form 16 for FY 23-24.

My last working date is 15th Aug, 2023.

Thank you!

entry.title: $100 Off Temu Promo Code {acr897367} or {frg227060} First Order June 2024
entry.content:
Use $100 off Temu coupon code using the code {acr897367} or {frg227060} Working In 14 Countries To Recieve your discount coupon bundle. This Temu $100 Off code is specifically for new customers and can be redeemed to receive a $100 discount on your purchase.

The error "HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED" in your GSTR1 RAP application in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud is caused by the maximum number of HTTP client connections being exceeded. This occurs when multiple HTTP requests are generated for an instance and cannot be handled. To resolve this issue, you can try the following:

Reduce the Number of HTTP Requests:
Check if there are any unnecessary HTTP requests being generated in your application. Try to minimize the number of requests by optimizing your code or using more efficient methods.
Increase the Maximum Number of Connections:
You can increase the maximum number of HTTP client connections by configuring the max_connections parameter in your SAP system. However, be cautious when doing so, as it may impact system performance.

entry.title: $100 off Temu Sign Up Bonus Code {acr897367} or {frg227060} For First Order New User - 30% Discount
entry.content:
Unlock a $100 discount on your Temu purchase by applying the coupon code {acr897367} or {frg227060} at checkout. This offer is exclusively for new customers.

The error "HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED" in your GSTR1 RAP application in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud is caused by the maximum number of HTTP client connections being exceeded. This occurs when multiple HTTP requests are generated for an instance and cannot be handled. To resolve this issue, you can try the following:

Reduce the Number of HTTP Requests:
Check if there are any unnecessary HTTP requests being generated in your application. Try to minimize the number of requests by optimizing your code or using more efficient methods.
Increase the Maximum Number of Connections:
You can increase the maximum number of HTTP client connections by configuring the max_connections parameter in your SAP system. However, be cautious when doing so, as it may impact system performance.

entry.title: Free Temu Coupon Code $100 Off {acr897367} or {frg227060} - 90% Off First Order
entry.content:
Score a massive $100 off your initial Temu order by entering either {acr897367} or {frg227060} as the coupon code when finalizing your purchase.

The error "HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED" in your GSTR1 RAP application in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud is caused by the maximum number of HTTP client connections being exceeded. This occurs when multiple HTTP requests are generated for an instance and cannot be handled. To resolve this issue, you can try the following:

Reduce the Number of HTTP Requests:
Check if there are any unnecessary HTTP requests being generated in your application. Try to minimize the number of requests by optimizing your code or using more efficient methods.
Increase the Maximum Number of Connections:
You can increase the maximum number of HTTP client connections by configuring the max_connections parameter in your SAP system. However, be cautious when doing so, as it may impact system performance.
